context: Tests whether the agent correctly configures a Phoenix application for production deployment following Elixir/Phoenix best practices: using runtime.exs with System.get_env!/1 for secrets, implementing release-based migrations, adding a database-querying health endpoint, setting the correct log level, using Docker multi-stage builds, and attaching telemetry handlers in Application.start/2.

checklist.name: runtime.exs uses System.get_env!/1
checklist.description: config/runtime.exs calls System.get_env!/1 (with the bang/! suffix) — not System.get_env/1 — for at least one secret or URL (e.g., DATABASE_URL, SECRET_KEY_BASE)

checklist.name: Secrets in runtime.exs only
checklist.description: DATABASE_URL and SECRET_KEY_BASE are configured in config/runtime.exs, NOT hardcoded in config/config.exs or config/prod.exs

checklist.name: Release module with Ecto.Migrator
checklist.description: lib/pay_core/release.ex (or similar) defines a migrate/0 function that uses Ecto.Migrator.with_repo/3 or Ecto.Migrator.run/4 to run migrations

checklist.name: No mix ecto.migrate in deployment
checklist.description: DEPLOYMENT.md and any scripts reference bin/pay_core eval or bin/migrate (release commands) for running migrations — NOT mix ecto.migrate

checklist.name: Health endpoint queries database
checklist.description: The health controller performs an actual database query (e.g., Ecto.Adapters.SQL.query, Repo.query, or equivalent) rather than simply returning a static 200 response

checklist.name: Health endpoint returns JSON
checklist.description: The health controller action returns a JSON response (uses json/2 or render with JSON format) indicating the database connection status

checklist.name: Logger level :info in production
checklist.description: config :logger, level: :info appears in config/runtime.exs or config/prod.exs — the level is :info, NOT :debug

checklist.name: Docker multi-stage build
checklist.description: Dockerfile contains at least two FROM instructions — a build stage (with Elixir/Mix) and a separate runtime stage (e.g., Alpine or Debian slim without Elixir toolchain)

checklist.name: Telemetry in Application.start/2
checklist.description: lib/pay_core/application.ex attaches telemetry handlers inside the start/2 callback — not inside a GenServer init/1 or at module level

checklist.name: No debug-level log config
checklist.description: No production configuration file sets the logger level to :debug (the level must be :info or higher, never :debug)
